news.t: Worried About AI Stocks? Look Abroad For Dividends and Value.
This group of stocks should trounce the S&P 500, according to a veteran money manager
Dimensional Lists Four New International Equity ETFs

holdings.infoBox: DISV is an equity ETF with a total of 1614 individual holdings. The top holdings are Swiss Prime Site AG stock at 0.85%, Carrefour at 0.73%, The Swatch Group AG at 0.66%, Eldorado Gold at 0.66%, and Syensqo at 0.63%.

overview.description: The Dimensional International Small Cap Value ETF (DISV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in small-cap stocks. The fund actively invests in a broad and diverse portfolio of small-cap companies in developed markets, excluding the US. Stock selection is based on value characteristics and weighted by market capitalization. DISV was launched on Mar 23, 2022 and is issued by Dimensional.

data.title: Worried About AI Stocks? Look Abroad For Dividends and Value.
data.text: The recent pullback for big techs in the U.S. underscores the need for investors to focus more on international stocks and bonds.

data.title: This group of stocks should trounce the S&P 500, according to a veteran money manager
data.text: U.S. stocks are trading at high valuations relative to historical averages, pointing to a long period of weak performance.

data.title: Dimensional Lists Four New International Equity ETFs
data.text: AUSTIN, Texas--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Dimensional Fund Advisors, a global leader in systematic multifactor investing, expanded its exchange-traded funds (ETFs) offering with today's listing of four new inte...
